# Deel Official Product + Pricing Pages (2026)

## Summary
Authoritative Deel pricing and product surface as of May 2026. Deel now publishes complete tiered pricing publicly — a major transparency advantage over Rippling. Documents the full product catalog including Deel IT (5 modular components launched 2025-2026), Deel Mobility (4-tier visa/immigration suite), US PEO, Contractor of Record (COR), and the full HR module pricing ($5-$56/employee/month depending on tier).

## Key quotations / statistics
- **EOR pricing (fully published):**
  - Standard: Starting at $599/employee/month
  - Enterprise: Starting at $899/employee/month
- **US PEO Standard:** Starting at $125/employee/month
- **Contractor pricing:**
  - Standard: Starting at $49/contractor/month
  - Contractor of Record (COR): Starting at $325/contractor/month
- **Deel HR (HRIS) modules:**
  - Core HR: $5/employee/month
  - Recruit (includes Core HR): $14/employee/month
  - Develop (includes Core HR): $22/employee/month
  - Recruit & Develop Bundle: $30/employee/month
  - Full HR Solution: $56/employee/month
- **Managed Payroll:**
  - Global Payroll: Starting at $29/employee/month
  - US Payroll: Starting at $29/employee/month
- **Deel IT pricing (per user/month):**
  - Starter (DLM + MDM + EPP): $45
  - Growth (+ 24/7 support): $125
  - Scale (+ IAM): $133
  - Platform only: $10
  - Add-ons: DLM from $18/device/mo; MDM $14/device/mo; EPP from $12/device/mo; 24/7 Support from $99/seat/mo; IAM from $16/user/mo
- **Talent:** Starting at $99 per hire + recruitment fees
- **Coverage:** 150+ countries, 40,000+ customers, $20B+ global payroll processed, 150+ currencies (including crypto), 2,000+ local experts
- **Key features:** Actionable AI in payroll/hiring/IT flows; all modules on a single HR data layer (no migrations between modules); Slack/Teams plugin with all HR modules; no hidden fees; month-to-month pricing; in-house infrastructure (owned entities and single payroll engines)
- **2025-2026 announcements:**
  - Deel IT launched as standalone product suite with 5 modular components
  - Deel Mobility (immigration) expanded to 4-tier product with managed visa handling
  - Full pricing publicly listed (transparency shift)
  - "Actionable AI" integrated into payroll and hiring approval flows
  - "Payroll Connect" add-on for consolidated reporting from Deel + third-party payroll providers

## Annotations for stinger-forge
- Deel's full public pricing is the most useful procurement data in the EOR space — use the Standard ($599) vs Enterprise ($899) tier distinction in `guides/03-international-eor.md` to flag that high-touch service levels carry meaningful uplift
- The Deel HR module pricing ($5-$56) is a new dimension for the platform decision — a company using Deel for contractors/EOR can add Core HR for $5/employee, which may make Deel competitive with Rippling for HR-light use cases
- Deel IT at $45/$125/$133 per user is direct competition with Rippling IT — useful for the "we want one vendor for global hires + IT" decision; should appear in `guides/01-platform-selection.md` as a "Deel-as-Rippling-alternative-for-global-first-teams" sub-thread
- COR (Contractor of Record) at $325/contractor is the misclassification-liability-transfer product — important for `guides/02-classification-matrix.md` as the alternative to W-2 conversion when a contractor relationship is at risk but the company is not ready to commit to EOR
- Deel's public pricing transparency is a meaningful selection factor against Rippling for procurement-driven evaluations — surface in `guides/01-platform-selection.md`
- Note: Deel US PEO at $125/employee is meaningfully more expensive than Justworks PEO Basic ($79) or Plus ($109); verify what's included in Deel US PEO before recommending it over Justworks
